name: maos-ui-designer
description: AI-friendly product UI design workflow for frontend, SaaS, admin, mobile, CLI/TUI, and Figma work.

interface.longDescription: A professional UI design workflow for Codex that clarifies product context, selects AI-friendly frontend frameworks and component libraries by surface and product type, guides design tokens and StyleX/Tailwind/UI-kit choices, and verifies polished app screens across web, SaaS, admin, mobile, CLI/TUI, Figma, and design-system work.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $maos-ui-designer to clarify the product context, choose an AI-friendly UI framework, and design or review this interface.
